prompt: Create a warm, cinematic photorealistic portrait of two Japanese high school girls in sailor-style school uniforms sharing a gentle affectionate hug in an empty classroom at golden hour. The foreground girl, long straight black hair, sits facing the camera behind a wooden classroom chair, with her hands resting on the top rail of the chair back; she wears a navy-and-white sailor uniform with a red ribbon at the chest. The second girl, short dark brown bob hair, stands close behind her and wraps both arms around her shoulders and chest in a protective, tender embrace; she wears a matching navy-and-white sailor uniform. Place exactly 2 girls, exactly 2 visible school desks, exactly 2 visible chairs in the foreground/midground, and 1 chalkboard in the blurred background. Obscure both faces with soft rectangular blur blocks, one over each face, while keeping hair, uniforms, arms, and pose visible. The classroom should have warm sunset light streaming through large windows on the right, glowing orange curtains, soft dust-filled atmosphere, shallow depth of field, realistic skin tones, natural hand placement, nostalgic Japanese classroom furniture, wooden chair backs, metal chair frames, and a softly blurred chalkboard on the left. Use a vertical 4:5 composition, eye-level camera angle, intimate but wholesome mood, realistic photography style, warm color grading, soft lens bokeh, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no exaggerated anatomy.
